summary: Sprint 5+7 retest after BookingIn dropoff_time/pickup_time patch. Full regression suite passes: 71/71 tests green (test_sprint5_7 10/10, test_sithappens 20/20, test_sprint2 10/10, test_sprint3 18/18, test_sprint4 13/13). The previously failing TestBookingTimes::test_booking_persists_dropoff_pickup now passes — POST /api/bookings correctly persists both fields and BookingOut surfaces them. Run-sheet secondary sort by dropoff_time is therefore exercisable and TestRunSheet::test_run_sheet_structure_and_sort still passes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1274 lines — consider splitting routes (bookings, dogs, homework, settings, waivers, incidents) into separate modules.

create_booking() still builds the doc field-by-field; future BookingIn additions risk the same silent-drop bug. Consider `doc = {**body.model_dump(exclude={'override_vaccines','override_capacity','check_in_now'}), ...overrides}` to auto-include all input fields.
_resolve_client_scope is `async` but does no await — could be a sync helper.
PUT /api/bookings/{id}/reschedule / RescheduleIn does not accept dropoff_time/pickup_time updates; if AdminBookingModal supports editing those after creation, an admin patch endpoint will be needed.
No dedicated PATCH/PUT for booking notes/kennel/times — only reschedule (dates) and check-in/out exist. Confirm with product whether admin needs to edit times post-creation.
seed_data_creation: Sprint 5+7 tests create TEST_S57_-prefixed clients/dogs/bookings/homework per module and clean them up via fixture teardown. Settings temporarily set to require all 3 vaccines during the module and restored to legacy single-vaccine mode after.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug from iteration_5 is fully resolved. Full backend regression is green at 71/71. Suggested next steps: split server.py into route modules; add an admin PATCH for booking times/notes/kennel if the AdminBookingModal needs edit support post-creation.
rca of the issue: Already fixed. Original bug: BookingIn lacked dropoff_time/pickup_time so FastAPI stripped them before create_booking() ran; create_booking also didn't reference them. Fix landed at server.py:200-201 (BookingIn fields) and 526-527 (doc keys). Verification: TestBookingTimes::test_booking_persists_dropoff_pickup now PASSED and run-sheet sort test continues to pass.
